title: Klarna fashions a bigger partnership with MandM to take legendary brands international
full_text:
London, 16 August – Klarna, the global payments network and shopping destination, today announced that it has expanded its partnership with British-based online fashion retailer MandM Direct to provide its services in more markets internationally. 

MandM Direct is a UK-based online fashion retailer which specialises in selling clearance stock at a discounted price to shoppers. It stocks over 150 brands including Adidas, Timberland, Diesel and Puma and is now one of Europe's leading online off-price retailers with over 3 million active customers, and delivering to over 25 countries worldwide.

Klarna currently works with MandM Direct in the UK and Germany but will now be offering its services in Ireland, France, Poland, the Netherlands and Denmark as well.

Shoppers in these new markets can now benefit from Klarna’s renowned smooth payments experience, giving them the flexibility to spread the cost of their purchase into three equal installments. Users will also be able to track and manage their spending through the Klarna app. 

Raji Behal, Head of Western & Southern Europe at Klarna, said: “Extending our partnership with a leading online fashion retailer reflects our commitment to offering users the best possible choice when using the Klarna platform. We are proud to offer our pay later service to more MandM customers internationally, and hope that our partnership will continue to flourish.”
